code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut x = n
  while x >= 10
    result = "#{result}X"
    x = x - 10
  end
  if x == 9
    result = "#{result}IX"
    x = 0
  end
  if x >= 5
    result = "#{result}V"
    x = x - 5
  end
  if x == 4
    result = "#{result}IV"
    x = 0
  end
  while x >= 1
    result = "#{result}I"
    x = x - 1
  end
  result
end

println(to_roman(4))
println(to_roman(9))
println(to_roman(27))
println(to_roman(39))
